about.heading: About me
about.bio_1: Data Scientist with training in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Natural Language Processing (NLP). Experience developing predictive models and classification systems using Python and SQL.
about.bio_2: Skilled at transforming complex data into actionable solutions. From sentiment classification models to environmental pollution predictions, every project aims to create real impact with data.
about.bio_3: Proactive professional with an analytical mindset and results-driven approach, seeking opportunities in the data science field.
about.education: Data Science I, II & III — Coderhouse
